# Global Agent Guidance

This folder contains reusable agent-facing guidance that is not
specific to `myHealth`.

Read files here when the task depends on cross-repo conventions such as
writing style, Python standards, or interface design patterns.

## Current Files

- `copilot.md`
  General agent guidance currently carried forward from earlier repo
  structure
- `interface-boundaries.md`
  Boundary and adapter design guidance
- `markdown-formatting.md`
  Markdown readability and formatting rules
- `python.md`
  Python coding guidance

## Boundary

If a file describes `myHealth`-specific constraints, it should live in
`../repo/` instead.
